content_fingerprint: openai makes chatgpt free for verified clinicians on ios and android openai is offering free chatgpt access to verified healthcare professionals on mobile aiming to integrate ai directly into clinical workflows openai has announced that verified clinicians on ios and android can now access chatgpt for free lowering the barrier to using ai tools in healthcare settings the initiative is part of a broader effort to expand ai adoption among medical professionals the announcement highlights the availability of chatgpt on mobile platforms allowing clinicians to interact with the ai tool directly fro
